installedByteParity.reason: Template is not executed; installed visible-tab byte parity is missing.

requiredRows.routeAction: Start on YouTube Home in whitelist mode, navigate to a search results page without full reload.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: No long visible stall, no repeated forced refresh loop, expected non-allowed cards hidden only after intended identity decision.

requiredRows.routeAction: From search, open a channel page through normal YouTube SPA navigation.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: Channel content remains usable; whitelist behavior does not hide channel scaffolding while identity hydrates.

requiredRows.routeAction: Open a video from the channel page.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: Player, title, owner row, metadata, and watch controls remain visible as expected; right-rail does not leak or false-hide due to stale timers.

requiredRows.routeAction: Navigate away from watch to Home using YouTube navigation.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: No stale delayed watch-route timer forces a broad reprocess after the route changes.

requiredRows.routeAction: Scroll the watch page right rail and observe recommendation hydration.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: No runaway mutation/timer fanout; allowed/non-allowed recommendations match whitelist expectations.

requiredRows.routeAction: Repeat Home/Search/Watch navigation after learned-map rows have been populated.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: Duplicate learned rows do not visibly slow later navigation or trigger repeated DOM flicker.

requiredRows.routeAction: Open the extension dashboard as a parent/account profile and confirm the protected target profile, managed link, and installed extension identity before touching YouTube.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: Parent/account authority is active, the protected profile is not the admin authority, and the artifact records parent/protected profile ids without PINs or plaintext rule values.

requiredRows.routeAction: Apply a Main/Kids viewing-space policy for the protected profile and open the denied YouTube surface.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: The denied surface is blocked by the managed route gate before usable YouTube content remains available, while the allowed surface still opens.

requiredRows.routeAction: Set a small protected-profile daily YouTube budget and keep an active YouTube tab open long enough to consume budget.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: The background-owned active-tab budget decreases across SPA navigation/reload and does not count when no managed time policy is active.

requiredRows.routeAction: Set a zero or already-exhausted protected-profile budget and reload/open YouTube.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: The protected timeout overlay appears, is not dismissible by child authority, and normal FilterTube blocklist/whitelist behavior is not used as the time-limit authority.

requiredRows.routeAction: Open protected action history after a managed policy accept/reject or time-limit change.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: Parent-visible history shows accepted/rejected outcomes, policy scope, revision, and redacted labels without plaintext rules, PINs, private keys, ciphertext, or raw policy JSON.

requiredRows.routeAction: Switch to a profile with no managed policy/time limit and repeat one Home/Search/Watch navigation.
requiredRows.requiredObservation: No managed provider pull loop, time-limit heartbeat, timeout overlay, or extra YouTube observer/timer work runs when no managed policy is applicable.
